roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1/3000REIN/PAJ: 80 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/4019HALF/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 20 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: UPON COMPLETION OF COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE, DEFENDANT MAY BE RELEASED TO PAROLE AGENT R, MCELROY ONLY, (STAR #6994) 510-872-7084/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
